title: Fix Ferrus ID mismatch and refire Rust congress

log.context: Fix Ferrus ID mismatch and refire Rust congress

Already in sync with remote (no output means nothing ahead, nothing dirty). The commit was already pushed. Everything is done.

Here's a summary of what was done:

**Bug fix — `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/workflows/congress_wf.py` lines 112–146:**

The custom persona lookup only did an exact `name` match. `wolf.md` has `name: wolf` but the caller passed `"The Wolf"`, so it silently fell through.

The fix adds two fallback tiers:
